# VERIFY: #124 — Enforce pre-lock resolution gate
<!-- Generated by start-feature-planning | tech-designer output -->

**Intent:** Verify that the pre-lock resolution gate blocks artifact freezing when unresolved items exist, surfaces them to the user, collects inline resolutions, and writes an audit trail.

### Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] discover-product: "accept risk" language is absent from Step 7
- [ ] discover-product: RESOLVED interview present for both blocker and warning cases
- [ ] discover-product: auto-proceed only when ready_for_lock: true AND issues list empty
- [ ] discover-product: pre-lock-resolution task in status-file schema
- [ ] discover-product: pre-lock-resolutions.yaml written to STM before lock
- [ ] plan-roadmap: pre-lock-resolution task in task graph (blocked by human-review, blocks produce-roadmap)
- [ ] plan-roadmap: Step 5 Tether reads feasibility.yaml before proceeding
- [ ] plan-roadmap: Step 5 checks critical_blockers and open_questions for non-empty
- [ ] plan-roadmap: RESOLVED interview shown when either array non-empty
- [ ] plan-roadmap: Tether honored immediately only when both arrays empty
- [ ] plan-roadmap: pre-lock-resolutions.yaml written before Step 6
- [ ] prepare-implementation: Step 18 scans all 5 artifacts for open_questions[]
- [ ] prepare-implementation: Step 18 scans architecture.yaml and tech.yaml for high-severity risks
- [ ] prepare-implementation: RESOLVED interview shown when items found
- [ ] prepare-implementation: standard Tether only after gate clears
- [ ] prepare-implementation: pre-lock-resolutions.yaml written before Step 19
- [ ] All three: Vanish at resolution interview halts without locking
- [ ] All three: clean path (no items) behaves identically to pre-change

### Verification Steps

| Step | Method | Expected Outcome |
|------|--------|-----------------|
| 1 | Grep discover-product for "accept risk" | Zero matches |
| 2 | Grep discover-product for "RESOLVED" | >= 2 occurrences |
| 3 | Read discover-product Step 7 auto-proceed condition | Requires issues list empty |
| 4 | Read discover-product status schema | pre-lock-resolution task present |
| 5 | Read plan-roadmap Step 1 task graph | pre-lock-resolution row present |
| 6 | Read plan-roadmap Step 5 Tether path | feasibility read + array check |
| 7 | Grep plan-roadmap for "RESOLVED" | >= 1 in Step 5 |
| 8 | Read prepare-implementation Step 18 "all pass" | Artifact scan block present |
| 9 | Grep prepare-implementation for "RESOLVED" | >= 1 in Step 18 |
| 10 | Diff validate-product-vision and validate-implementation-design | Zero changes |

### Edge Cases

| Scenario | Expected Behavior |
|----------|------------------|
| discover-product: ready_for_lock true, zero issues | Auto-proceed, no interview |
| discover-product: ready_for_lock true, only suggestions | Auto-proceed |
| discover-product: ready_for_lock true, warnings present | Interview required |
| discover-product: blockers, user types RESOLVED | Re-validate; if still blockers, re-present |
| plan-roadmap: feasibility_path null | Gate skipped, Tether proceeds |
| plan-roadmap: critical_blockers empty, open_questions non-empty | Only open-questions interview |
| plan-roadmap: both arrays empty | Tether accepted immediately |
| plan-roadmap: RESOLVED with fewer answers than items | Re-present unanswered items |
| prepare-implementation: no artifacts have open_questions field | Gate passes, standard Tether |
| prepare-implementation: high-risk with existing mitigation | Still surfaces — user must explicitly resolve |
| prepare-implementation: user types Orbit | Re-draft artifact, re-validate, re-gate |
